globalStyle.motion: heavy ash fall, rolling smoke, charred root eruptions, ember pulses, ground cracks
globalStyle.topologyNote: Core spell silhouettes are structured as quad-friendly radial rings, root strips, cloud lobes, bloom petals, and ground decals; transient ash/ember particles remain lightweight runtime primitives.

Ashroot Crush.animationFlow: limb rises -> heavy descent -> impact flash -> fissures glow -> ash settles

Ash Cloud.animationFlow: ash column bursts -> cloud rolls outward -> embers pulse -> targets grey out -> ash settles

Death Bloom.animationFlow: ground bulges -> bloom rises -> petals unfurl -> spores burst -> bloom collapses

Cinderroot Snare.animationFlow: ground trembles -> roots burst upward -> roots wrap target -> embers pulse -> roots crumble

Blightwood Pulse.animationFlow: core dims -> pulse expands -> ground darkens -> rootlets wither -> field fades

Ashen Regrowth.animationFlow: ash draws inward -> embers surge -> bark seals -> armor forms -> pulses sustain
